content.en:
The Lord of the Yuan Capital found that Ye Tian's eyes had been staring at him, and his heart became more and more frightened.

He was afraid that Ye Tian was really the bone transformation realm who was killed by him at the beginning, then he would be finished!

"Lord of the Yuan Capital, long time no see!"

Ye Tian spoke, and the voice reached the ears of the Lord of the Yuan Capital.

This moment.

The face of the lord of the Yuan capital is like ashes.

An ancient Heng Mountain lord like Ye Tian would definitely not know a little person like him, and now that Ye Tian directly called out his name, it was likely that he was investigating.

So.

The answer is imminent.

Ye Tian is the bone transformation realm that he killed, it is likely that he killed a clone, so the real Ye Tian did not die, and became a lord of Gu Heng Mountain.

Of course.

He still had a glimmer of hope at the moment, so he still gritted his teeth and said, "I've seen Lord Venerable!"

Now.

The sect master of the Xuanling Sect and the other elders were very excited, and they thought that the Lord of the Yuan Capital and the Lord of Endless knew each other, and the relationship was very good.

Then, the Xuanling Sect will be 100% able to join Guheng Mountain!

But in the next second, the Xuanling Sect went up and down, and his face changed drastically.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian waved his hand, and the Lord of the Yuan Capital was grabbed by him without any resistance and landed on the palm of his hand.

"Endless Lord spare your life!"

The lord of the capital begged for mercy.

The Sect Master of the Xuanling Sect, the Lord of the Dust Spirit, reacted quickly, "From now on, the Lord of the Yuan Capital is no longer a member of the Xuanling Sect, and he is at the disposal of the Venerable Lord. "

He was very simple and sold the lord of the Yuan Capital as soon as possible.

Even if the Lord of the Yuan Capital had some potential, and even had the hope of becoming an eighth-stage bone transformation realm existence, it was also dispensable for the Xuanling Sect.

If it was because of the Lord of the Yuan Capital, the Xuanling Sect lost the opportunity to join Gu Heng Mountain, it would be too innocent.

Thus.

He must abandon the Lord of the Yuan Capital.

"Yes, Lord Venerable, the Lord of the Yuan Capital has nothing to do with our Xuanling Sect!"

One by one, the elders of the Xuanling Sect hurriedly said.

Now.

The Lord of the Yuan Capital saw that the sect masters and elders of the Xuanling Sect had abandoned him, and he was extremely sad.

However, he also knew very well that it was impossible for the Xuanling Sect to offend Gu Hengshan for him, and he couldn't afford to offend him!

"Lord of the Yuan Capital, when you killed my clone in order to snatch the Canghe Pearl, I almost forgot, but I didn't expect to meet you in the Xuanling Sect today!" Ye Tian said slightly.

The sect masters and elders of the Xuanling Sect learned that the Lord of the Yuan Capital had killed the clone of the Venerable Lord, and their faces changed drastically one by one, this is not an ordinary offense!

This is a great enemy!

"The lord of the capital is dead!"

They were eager to slaughter the lord of the capital immediately.

Feeling that Ye Tian really wanted to kill him, he kept begging for mercy, but to no avail.

He wanted to escape, but even the void in Ye Tian's hand couldn't be broken, and he couldn't escape at all.

Click!

Ye Tian pinched it lightly, the void shattered, and the body of the Lord of the Yuan Capital was annihilated along with the void in his palm.

The lord of the Yuan Capital, fallen.

Killing the Lord of the Yuan Capital was just a small episode for him.

He wouldn't have any other opinions about the Xuanling Sect because of this matter.

He still followed the normal procedure, if the Xuanling Sect met the standards of the affiliated forces of Gu Heng Mountain and was qualified to join, he would also agree.

But if the Xuanling Sect didn't have any qualifications, then he would give up directly.

......

Ye Tian sat on the throne, accompanied by the sect masters and elders of the Xuanling Sect.

"Don't worry, the matter of the Lord of the Yuan Capital will not affect your evaluation. According to the regulations of Gu Heng Mountain, you Xuanling Sect must show that you meet the standards of our Gu Heng Mountain before you are eligible to join Gu Heng Mountain and become a subsidiary force. Ye Tian said.

The Lord of the Dust Spirit hurriedly said, "Lord Venerable, this is the strength of our Xuanling Sect and the distribution of resources. "

He took out a document and handed it to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian took a look, the strength and resources of the Xuanling Sect were not bad.

But it still looks ordinary, nothing special.

"If that's not enough, you know?"

Ye Tiandao.

"I understand!" the Lord of the Dust Spirit nodded, "But our Xuanling Sect still has a special place in our hands, and we can dedicate this special treasure land to Gu Heng Mountain as a condition for joining Gu Heng Mountain. "

"Treasure land?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

"Please come with us!"

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Dust Spirit took Ye Tian to a treasure place.

They kept shuttling and spending, and it took a while to come to an area close to the Domain River.

"Your Excellency, this is it!"

The Lord of the Dust Spirit said, pointing to a dark area in the distance.

"Let's go, let's go in together!"

Ye Tiandao.

Whoa!!!

A skeletal transmutation entered this treasure land.

At this time, the Lord of the Dust Spirit reminded, "Your Excellency, this treasure place is a little special and a little dangerous. "

"As for the special part, once we enter here, the immeasurable will will be sealed, and we will not be able to exert the power of the immeasurable will, which will make it difficult for us to control our physical body, and it will be difficult to exert our strength. "

The Lord of Dust said.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as they entered this treasure land, the immeasurable will of the bone transformation realm was sealed, and they suddenly felt that their bodies were extremely heavy.

Ye Tian moved his body for a moment, feeling that it was difficult to exert his strength.

Both speed and strength are greatly reduced.

This is the consequence of the immeasurable will being sealed.

"What a quirky place!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Then.

The Lord of the Dust Spirit said: "Lord Venerable, this treasure land has only been born for a short time, and I haven't seen much resources at present, but as long as the resources are found, it will have an improvement effect on the immeasurable will, and there is also the effect of permanently improving understanding, but the improvement is not much." We only dare to explore the periphery, and we do not dare to explore the inner perimeter yet. Previously, one of our eight-time bone metamorphosis attempted to explore the inner perimeter, only to be killed by the creatures inside. "

"In fact, the creatures here are not strong, but our immeasurable will is sealed, and our strength cannot be exerted, once we are besieged, even if our physical body is strong, it will be besieged and consumed to death. "

Hear here.

Ye Tian felt that this treasure land was not simple!

He had never seen such a strange treasure before.

The point is that he is a genius on the other side of the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm, and even he can't compete with the rules here, and his immeasurable will is still sealed, and he can't mobilize the slightest.

Now.

He can only rely on the instinct of the flesh to manipulate the flesh to fight, and the strength he exerts is naturally not much.

Abrupt.

A black giant ape appeared and killed him.

"It's the Black Abyss Giant Ape, Lord Venerable, let's go out immediately. It should be that there are too many bone transformation realms that came in this time, which caused the attack of such creatures. The Lord of the Dust Spirit hurriedly shouted.
